\tzpentry{ID4487}{Torsion Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4487 introduces Torsion Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \tau_c \sim \frac{1}{|\lambda_{\max}|}. \end{equation}
